- [ ] Title: concise, imperative description of the change
- [ ] Summary: what and why
- [ ] Changes: list of files/areas touched
- [ ] How to test: steps to verify the change
- [ ] How to verify Swagger/docs: update swagger and UI if needed
- [ ] Security: ensure no secrets/credentials are committed
- [ ] Related issues: #<issue-number> (if any)

### Additional Context
- Any background or trade-offs

### Checklist
- [ ] Code adheres to project style
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Type checking passes
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Swagger spec updated (if API surface changed)
